name: Pecan-Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour, margarine, and 1/4 cup brown sugar in a bowl. Press into an ungreased baking pan, 8x8x2".
3. Bake for 10 minutes.
4. Beat the remaining ingredients (except pecans) in a small mixer bowl on low speed, scraping the bowl constantly, for 30 seconds.
5. Increase the speed to medium and beat for 1 minute, scraping the bowl occasionally.
6. Spread over the baked layer and sprinkle with pecans.
7. Bake until edges are lightly browned, about 25 minutes.
8. Cool and refrigerate at least 2 hours before cutting into 1-1/4 inch squares.
9. Store in refrigerator. About 3 dozen squares.
Cherry-Cheesecake Squares: Substitute 1/4 cup granulated sugar for the 1/3 cup brown sugar and stir 1/3 cup chopped candied cherries into the cheese mixture before pouring over the baked layer.
